# 13 Original Colonies vs. Other U.S. States

## The 13 Original Colonies
*(States that ratified the Constitution and were part of the original union)*

| Colony | Modern State |
|--------|-------------|
| Virginia | Virginia |
| Massachusetts | Massachusetts |
| New Hampshire | New Hampshire |
| Maryland | Maryland |
| Connecticut | Connecticut |
| Rhode Island | Rhode Island |
| Delaware | Delaware |
| New York | New York |
| New Jersey | New Jersey |
| North Carolina | North Carolina |
| South Carolina | South Carolina |
| Pennsylvania | Pennsylvania |
| Georgia | Georgia |

---

## Key Differences

| Factor | 13 Colonies | Later States |
|--------|-------------|--------------|
| **Entry method** | Revolution/ratification | Congressional admission |
| **Historical status** | Founded British rule | Territories, purchases, annexations |
| **Representation** | Shaped the Constitution | Joined existing framework |
| **Age** | Pre-1776 | 1791–1959 |

---

Were you asking about a **specific comparison** — historical, political, cultural, or something else? I can narrow it down!
